rows.name: HMX Cloud V2
rows.note: V2 mold (L4 tooling) now widely in stock at US/EU vendors; LumeKeebs and UniKeys comparison posts driving discovery. Factory lube consistency praised in community threads — steady upward velocity from W20's flat 35.

rows.name: Gateron Oil King
rows.note: No new drops or reviews this week; long-tail vendor stock keeps it visible but search and social volume unchanged from W20. Slight single-point erosion as HMX Cloud V2 comparison posts pull some discovery traffic.

rows.name: Cherry MX2A
rows.note: Tom's Guide 'sick of Hall Effect hype' piece inadvertently resurfaces MX2A tactility complaints in comment threads. No new revision announcement from Cherry; downtrend continues as HMX and Gateron alternatives dominate recommendation threads.

rows.name: Hall Effect / Rapid Trigger
rows.note: 40% of tracked pro esports players now on HE or analog-optical per April 2026 data. Budget HE options now under $70 collapse the price barrier. TMR sensor coverage from CES 2026 still cycling through creator pipeline. Strongest switch-tech trend in the tracker.

rows.name: GMK CYL Prussian Alert
rows.note: GB live May 15 – June 12 across 10 regional vendors including KBDfans, Yushakobo, Prototypist. GeekHack IC thread actively moderated; OG Icon modifiers and custom grey/white base generating strong aesthetic buzz mid-GB window.

rows.name: GMK CYL Ramune
rows.note: GB opened May 15 across 10 vendors (Divinikey US, Prototypist UK, Geonworks KR, Yushakobo JP et al.). Pastel dual-blue plus pink WS1-white colorway driving Instagram and Discord hype in its first full active week. Ships Q3/Q4 2026.

rows.name: DCS Grass Valley
rows.note: GB window May 1 – June 1 now in its final weeks; Prototypist-led with Geonworks/MiNoKeys support. Broadcast-era retro colorway appeals to vintage-inspired builds. Community reception positive but set sits in a quieter discovery window mid-GB.

rows.name: MT3 Profile
rows.note: No new MT3 GB opened this week; existing sets moving through production pipeline without notable community event. Drop.com stock-drop cadence unchanged. Flat trend continues from W20 as Cherry-profile GMK sets dominate mindshare.

rows.name: 75% Layout
rows.note: Keychron Q1 Ultra 75% receiving highest volume of Q Ultra review traffic this week; MKBGuide and UniKeys round-up articles both crown 75% the 'golden ratio' layout for 2026. Rotary knob standard across form factor reinforces recommendation dominance.

rows.name: Split / ergo (Voyager, Glove80)
rows.note: Steady baseline; Glove80 community Discord remains highly active, Voyager still recommended in beginner ergo guides. No new hardware or firmware release this week to spike signal. Holds W20 score as structural RSI-awareness demand stays consistent.

rows.name: Alice layout
rows.note: Community debate sharpens around Alice offering less wrist freedom than true splits; competitive-gaming coverage continues to cast doubt on ergonomic claims. Keychron B11 Pro foldable Alice launch noted but seen as mass-market rather than enthusiast signal.

rows.name: Mode Designs
rows.note: Encore 2026 pre-orders (opened Apr 16, shipping Jul 2026) entering peak word-of-mouth window; Crown Mounting System coverage in PC Gamer and Green-Keys this week. Prologue 98% teaser sustaining anticipation in background.

rows.name: Keychron
rows.note: Tom's Hardware Q6 Ultra 8K review published; 660-hour battery and 8K ZMK story generating mainstream press pickup. V Ultra lineup launch window imminent. Silk POM switch praised in roundups. Strongest brand momentum in the tracker this week.

rows.name: Wuque Studio
rows.note: Paper80 TKL clearing positive YouTube review cycle via Whatever Studio collab; Original Aspiration switch stocked at CannonKeys attracting budget-premium linear buyers. Minor positive uptick from W20's flat-8 as brand visibility improves.

rows.name: Cherry (GMK parent)
rows.note: No MX2A update announcement; clone-vs-GMK pricing discourse intensifies as quality Chinese manufacturers close the gap. Geonworks 2026 GMK warehouse sale signals oversupply on older sets. Cherry brand sentiment continues structural slide in enthusiast channels.

rows.name: CannonKeys
rows.note: Steady in-stock rotation including Wuque Studio OA switch and various GB extras. No major new GB opened this week; community trust baseline solid but nothing to spike discourse. Holds near W20 flat score.

rows.name: Prototypist
rows.note: DCS Grass Valley GB mid-run and GMK CYL Ramune and Prussian Alert as regional vendor keeps pipeline busy, but no new GB opened specifically from Prototypist this week. Slight deceleration from W20's active-window spike; trend settles to flat carry.

rows.name: NovelKeys
rows.note: Spring Cleaning Sale now past; no major new GB or switch launch announced for W21. In-stock inventory rotation continues. Slight score drift downward from post-sale traffic decay but no negative catalyst; holds flat band.
